creator: buck@bvminc.com
text:
I attempted to install BSD 6.1 Rel on a BioStar MB with Nvidia nNforce
6100 chip set.

No support in BSD 6.1 for the Nic.

Had to change MB to VIA to make it work.

Found a unsupported Linux driver which the docs says is prone to lockups,
no info how to make it work.

forcedeth.c

http://www.nvidia.com/object/linux_nforce_1.21.html

Just F.Y.I.

Buck

Fix: 

add support in the next release of BSD 6.3, 6.4, etc to support the Nvidia
Nforce ethernet controller(s).
How-To-Repeat: buy a biostar mb with a Nforce 6100 chip set and try to install bsd.
